questions.label: Do you offer free shipping?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer free shipping on orders over €50.

questions.label: How can I track my order?
questions.answer: You can track your order using the tracking link sent to your email.

questions.label: Do you ship internationally?
questions.answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries! International delivery takes 7–14 business days.

questions.label: How can I return an item?
questions.answer: You can return items within 14 days. Please fill out the form on our site.

questions.label: When will I receive my refund?
questions.answer: Refunds are processed within 5 business days after receipt.

questions.label: Can I exchange an item?
questions.answer: Yes! Request an exchange through our return portal within 14 days.

questions.label: How do I know my size?
questions.answer: Check our size guide available on each product page.

questions.label: What if I'm between sizes?
questions.answer: We recommend sizing up for a more comfortable fit.

questions.label: Can I cancel my order?
questions.answer: Orders can be cancelled within 1 hour after purchase.

questions.label: Can I change my shipping address?
questions.answer: Contact us within 1 hour of ordering to update your details.

questions.label: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept Visa, MasterCard, PayPal, and Apple Pay.

questions.label: Can I pay in installments?
questions.answer: We are currently working on adding installment options soon!

questions.label: How can I contact support?
questions.answer: You can contact us at support@store.com or call +353 123 4567 during business hours (Mon–Fri, 9:00–17:00).

questions.label: Do you have physical stores?
questions.answer: We are 100% online. Our HQ is in Dublin, Ireland.
